textByHash.7a3a63dd3f874f419098ae04f485ba723abcd46e: This is the home of Sir Ceril Carnillean of the noble Carnillean family. You're welcome to look around, but I'm afraid I'll have to keep an eye on you.
textByHash.2e04ac492c75be8a345096b73ba0c9659f17a8cb: Recently we've been having a real problem with thieves and strange cultists coming out of the forest for some reason.
textByHash.c6ccfe6f39f4a9e309fae87707b38496692e3f7d: Yes, well, these things are bound to happen when you're as wealthy as the Carnilleans.
textByHash.89bd4fecd4528ba97f49ef9df0da353dc857d7fe: There's a lot I could tell you about the Carnillean family history. However, I'm afraid if I did speak about such matters I would be at risk of losing my job.
textByHash.f540a6fa28a98e01f02c20a8f033ab74e3464b6c: Long enough to know the Carnilleans are not as innocent or noble as they seem.
textByHash.0219b06310d1ca7a9f6810c693af09adfc579942: Yes? You need some help with your quest?
textByHash.2142824eafb2f89bb26484e78e58c51636b7a4a7: W-what? N-no I'm not, don't be silly!
textByHash.674b61ce81cd8f488e1db5bd3641f8df97acac55: You think you're so smart don't you? You might think you know what's going on but you have no idea.
textByHash.cee84d8ddb149443837ab3e8effe33de7987958a: Oh, you think so do you? You think that silly old fool Ceril will take YOUR word over MINE? He trusts me completely!
textByHash.b072ffcd3ede43d5ea199ef352a2353cfff153fc: This is your last warning adventurer: keep your nose out of our business.
textByHash.a5a37e0e70288026e6bb1fae400af8481c8c3b70: It wasn't me m'lud. I am, as you know, a loyal servant.
textByHash.c084d0d4eb34a74a4b419cf908df5503d7bc7aeb: Don't worry m'lud, this fool won't be bothering us any more.
textByHash.c2f6334c07c0b1977bf8dacb030a551b3309faa4: Cretin. Did you think you could 'save the day' just by accusing me? We've been planning this for YEARS. your meddling has been nothing more than a minor inconvenience.
textByHash.6c700b09851f578e389c4a954ec88b94107e2405: When Lord Hazeel returns, the likes of you and the arrogant Carnilleans will be first to suffer his vengeance.
textByHash.0afde998d2a5d860509934e4447a9a27f5020cce: That's basically my point. You cannot help it. Now begone!
textByHash.97d8d0c26be391b3e38a6b8ac93b757660ea1534: P-p-poison??? yeah... uh... well, hmm... Oh, it's for Killing rats.
textByHash.bc340bdd52e668b44e4beb5a284122ce040e32ea: Yes, that's right. Killing rats. I am but a loyal butler sir.
textByHash.cb86dc803a13d394924b23e4eac127c51d81642a: You senile old fool... It was all too easy! I should have killed you and your pathetic family weeks ago!
textByHash.f1986b6295c75b9511ff2e34e4c87d0156124fff: Don't think this is the last you have heard of me Ceril. You and your family will pay dearly for this. GLORY TO HAZEEL! ALL PRAISE ZAMORAK!
textByHash.c16c63460d97b828cbc54db683acef68cb07d5db: Hello friend. I heard about your handiwork. Quite amusing really. I'm sure Hazeel will be pleased anyway; Keep up the good work!
textByHash.a86415d3d5552c4a81d50287e49fade98364bc87: Hello again friend. I see you have the mark now; You should keep it covered up.
textByHash.48113dcb5256f367cacf613ed610de938380ec5f: Hello again friend. I see you decided to keep the mark of Hazeel discreetly about you.
textByHash.b1c7cde6aa0789e5d65ce9f4394696de75234a39: You don't have to pretend with me, friend! Our cause is one and the same; the sooner Lord Hazeel is avenged the better for this city... and for us!
textByHash.335bf581d0d26097122e39e3d047fa0eb0385f68: No idea I'm afraid. I KNOW it's somewhere in this house, but for the life of me I can't find it anywhere. I've searched high and low for it!
textByHash.7a3ba0a21de256c39df52b7067684268b29d3e80: Ha! That silly old fool? He can't see the forest for the trees.
textByHash.d5b09abde6a74aaf1128b10fc85e4a4e04cd2f31: Quick, get it back to our hideout! These are glorious times indeed adventurer, when the mighty Hazeel returns things are REALLY going to change around here!
textByHash.dbe56e651a357d2c21e146941380389f7d807fb7: Incompetent fool! The future of our entire plans relies on that scroll! You MUST find it and take it back to our hideout as soon as possible!
textByHash.9e473519a6958b04a1d454526737e5ed90c5222d: Hello, adventurer. How are you doing with your quest?
textByHash.bd55c5f21def66216018fdc41750c094146521a9: Have you hit your head? That's a preposterous accusation!
textByHash.41788b32ec7839bc954b16e60f2e5ba0367c1dca: Oh, you think he'll take your word over mine? He trusts me completely!
textByHash.c16b90f5cf3c56588ad50fc3533a131df9d838d0: Nothing to do with me, sir. I am, as you know, a loyal servant.
textByHash.188bd98f51e39e215b3d01351bd089156c496ccd: Don't worry, sir, he won't be bothering us any more.
textByHash.cff3f81ef167fda8704df3a347b493c7b36d9cee: I believe you've been asked to leave, adventurer.
textByHash.ad11329bfa941f0ae8cda3ba4c76533578baa17d: That's quite enough of that. All of us here are starting to tire of your theatrics.
textByHash.40961e75f6aa120329d09a5bac314b3e7433838b: Don't think this is over, Ceril! You will die at the hands of the Hazeel Cult! I promise you that!
textByHash.7023f7bd2a24bde459544b3db5cffd4f9fe9428a: Hello, adventurer. I hear your quest is going well.
textByHash.1ffc1e205ef8856fc6954feb0af7de9dcd5c114b: Oh yes. Do keep up the good work.
textByHash.5f9838b2b9ed9090c90900bd2ed6fdb98af11625: Hello, adventurer. Such a terrible shame about Scruffy. I wonder if the family will ever fully recover.
textByHash.98aebdb0b2660409719a3a447e9f6fab53246592: Anyway, I hear your quest is going well.
textByHash.27cef1a80d9702fa735976f28b6aa99e6f5748ca: Ah yes, the scroll. I'm afraid I've searched high and low, but have so far been unable to locate it. I'm sure it is somewhere within the house, hidden where even the family won't find it.
textByHash.d5ac84ac57d24e8882f757ecde06616e4dfc7a7d: Hello, adventurer. How is your quest going?
textByHash.5e37381968a6de9e4b476f9508f918e2a8e5c501: Good. Remember, the scroll must be somewhere within the house, hidden where even the family won't find it.
textByHash.34f0712924762c3a8dda916bcb7d578092da090c: Then you should waste no time in returning to Alomone. The return of Hazeel will soon be upon us!
textByHash.521239747465e98d1a3d2afed3190afff965a1de: It's an honour to be in your presence again, adventurer. I hope things are well?
textByHash.ff32c665defcb2672f74ac344ee029f8c4599c21: Unfortunately, I am still forced to deal with this insufferable family. Many generations have passed, but they are still the enemy. As such, they must be kept a close eye on.
textByHash.1ff34b63179dc97c596fa862d047c7b7b1bac3fd: Still, I have no doubt that the time will soon come for me to leave this place. Our lord will certainly have need of me elsewhere once his current work is complete.
